dismissalText.commentary: Yashasvi Jaiswal c Bosch b Jacks 27 (17b 1x4 3x6 22m) SR: 158.82

dismissalComment.html: He's mistimed this straight to point, Corbin Bosch catches Jaiswal out! Impeccable bowling from Jacks, 89 kph this. He keeps this on a perfect length, outside off, tempts Jaiswal to stay in his crease but still go for this. The shot, instead of flying down the ground, flies out to Bosch

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Naman Dhir b Chahar 4 (6b 0x4 0x6 26m) SR: 66.66

dismissalComment.html: Sooryavanshi has to depart early today! He has had enough waiting at the other end. Was there to be hit, on a length and moving away. Soorya misreads how well he can swing through the line. Tries to loft this over long on but sends out an edge down to backward point. Naman Dhir gobbles this one up, running in

dismissalText.commentary: Riyan Parag c Tilak Varma b Ghazanfar 14 (8b 2x4 1x6 9m) SR: 175

dismissalComment.html: And Tilak cuts Parag's innings shot! Parag honestly looks locked in, plays another great shot off a length ball outside off. But guess what: Tilak is stationed at a veryyy straight long-on spot, right on the ropes. He bounces on one knee near the stumps and pounces on this with both hands. A review, for formality's sake, but Parag has to walk back. The umpire had just one look at the replay, though... He deems it enough to flash "OUT" on the screen

dismissalText.commentary: Dasun Shanaka run out (Thakur/Bosch) 29 (15b 0x4 3x6 23m) SR: 193.33

dismissalComment.html: Shanaka runs a run and three quarters back before getting run out. Looked like it was the non-striker's call. Shanaka watched Jurel guide a length ball to backward point and took off. Jurel took a step or two, ball-watched and ran back. Shardul fumbled but had ample time to pick his end and send a low, comfy throw to Bosch.

dismissalText.commentary: Shubham Dubey c Naman Dhir b Thakur 5 (6b 0x4 0x6 13m) SR: 83.33

dismissalComment.html: Taken at long-on. Shardul went slow and into the pitch outside off. The towel clinging onto Shardul's trousers fell off in the run-up but Shubham went through with the swipe across the line. He picked out long-on as it went off the bottom of the bat. As he walks off, Kumar Sangakkara keeps him in the playing area while chatting to a match official, likely regarding the towel. Dead ball not rewarded. Batter walks off

dismissalText.commentary: Deepak Chahar lbw b Brijesh Sharma 8 (5b 0x4 1x6 5m) SR: 160

dismissalComment.html: Chahar walks back before the umpire raises his finger. He has reviewed, likely on Shardul's suggestion. Continues to walk as the replay comes on. Dipping low full toss on off. Chahar played across the line, looked to go square and was too early into the shot. Hit on the outer-half of the front shin with half of off-stump visible. Impact on middle and off and hitting middle, according to Hawk-Eye
